chapters.title: White Houses
chapters.content: Lena walked through the white streets of Santorini, surrounded by blue doors, flowers, and the bright summer sky.

chapters.title: The Cliff View
chapters.content: She found a quiet place near the cliffs and sat there with a cold drink, looking at the endless sea below.

chapters.title: Golden Sky
chapters.content: As the sun disappeared into the ocean, the sky turned orange and pink. Everyone around her became silent, simply watching the beauty.
